programme.title: Top 20 - Hottest Boys On The Beach - EP64
programme.desc: The TOP 20 is an exclusive collation of the news and the champions causing a buzz on planet sport!

programme.title: The Short List - Top 10 Hardest Hitting Heavyweights - EP14
programme.desc: The top 10 of the most impactful heavyweight boxers.

programme.title: Sports Woman - Iconic - EP24
programme.desc: In this edition of Sportswoman, the athletes who have become models to follow.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - Castaways - EP114
programme.desc: Stranded! The Super K’s accidentally took off in a hot air balloon without Mr. Arnold and crashed onto a deserted island. If they want to make it out of there, they have to band together to find food, water, shelter, and — hey, what are those mysterious footprints?

programme.desc: The story takes place in the distant future and focuses on a boy named Yuma Tsukumo, the number one bad boy at his school. Something unexpected happens when Ryoga challenges him to a Duel as the mysterious ghost of Astral appears before them, a new legend begins.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep10 - EP10
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Baby Einstein - Neptune's Oceans
programme.desc: Dive in with your little explorer across the seas to meet amazing animals living in the ocean, coral reef, and polar regions. Overflowing with underwater footage of whales, dolphins, tropical fish, and more, Neptune's Oceans invites you and your baby on an oceanic voyage of discovery!

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Habits - EP109
programme.desc: In this episode, we will discover that habits are the result of repeating good action until it becomes part of our routine. All of our activities are very important! That's why you should give a very special place for rest, for having fun, and for sharing with your friends and family. We will also learn about the importance of punctuality!

programme.title: Mellodees - Itsy Bitsy Spider - EP3

programme.desc: JD creates a mini-universe to store his stuff but it grows wildly out of control and starts consuming everything - and everyone - in the lab. / Having wrought destruction on the Lab’s indoor greenhouse, JD seeks refuge from the consequences of his actions by escaping through the VR Window to the Stone Age.

programme.title: Baby Einstein - On the Go: Riding, Sailing and Soaring
programme.desc: As little ones become increasingly mobile, their fascination with all things that move intensifies too. On the Go Riding Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Forgiveness - EP110
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go on an expedition to the Planet of Forgiveness and learn that forgiveness is an act of love that helps us overcome anger and misunderstandings and that when we forgive we see things with more clarity. And most importantly, when we recognize our mistakes we realize the importance of asking for forgiveness through our hearts.

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.desc: While the SMC sets out to save their local newspaper by bringing it to the internet, Jones borrows Lisa’s carefully saved money then can’t pay it back. Tensions escalate as both learn a high priced lesson.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends Minis
programme.desc: Get ready to watch Talking Tom and Friends at their cutest! Mini in size, but massive in fun, the Minis check out the day-to-day world of the friends we all know and love where they do the most ordinary things in the most extraordinary ways.

programme.title: Yeti Tales
programme.desc: Join Us in Yeti Tales !

programme.title: Timmy Time
programme.desc: Being an ‘only lamb in the flock’ Timmy has been used to getting his own way. Now for the first time Timmy is going to have to learn to get along with other little animals. Timmy is going to Nursery! Self-willed and naughty Timmy is going to have to learn how to share things with other youngsters and think about their feelings – not just his. Timmy is a gifted little footballer who needs to learn that it’s not enough to kick the ball – you have to pass it too. Harriet Heron and Osbourne Owl, who run the Nursery are going to have their hands full, but Timmy gets it right in the end with a little help from his friends of the furry, feathery and spikey type.

programme.title: Misha, the Purple Cat
programme.desc: Misha is a very lively, alert cat. She is very interested in investigating everything going on around her, which means she has some very entertaining adventures with her friends. Many things can happen in Misha’s world; especially exciting adventures, mysterious investigations, hilarious competitions... all with a feeling of close friendship.

programme.title: Baby Riki
programme.desc: The show covers all aspects of a child’s life from physical well-being to cognitive and soft skills. The musical stories are based around age-appropriate experiences with educational concepts introduced in familiar surroundings and context for infants.

programme.title: Leo the Wildlife Ranger
programme.desc: Leo the Wildlife Ranger introduces the secrets and wonders of nature and wildlife around us and kickstarts a curiosity and passion for nature in kids. With engaging missions and adventures, kids have fun while learning positive lessons!

programme.title: Counting With Paula
programme.desc: The show features Paula and her friends, Tim, Billy, Chalky, Calc, and the Numbers as they go on exciting adventures in colorful and exotic places. From the Amazon jungles to the deepest oceans, and to the hottest deserts, Paula and friends solve problems, have fun and make more friends along the way!

programme.title: Bino & Fino
programme.desc: Bino & Fino is about a brother and sister named Bino and Fino who live with their grandparents 'Mama' and 'Papa' in a modern day city in Africa. Bino and Fino have many adventures where, with the help of their friend Zeena the Magic Butterfly, they discover and learn things about the world.

programme.title: Horaci the Inuit
programme.desc: Packed with adventure, fun and excitement, HORACI THE INUIT will transport you to the Lands of the North where, together with his best friend Sedna, he will have to solve all kinds of mysteries! Horaci the Inuit takes place in a remote village and talks about universal values such as caring for nature, being intuitive and open-minded and, above all, having a loving respect for family and friends!

programme.title: Hogie the Globehopper
programme.desc: Hogie the Globehopper is a fun tv show that will inspire a curiosity and fascination about the world and its people. Hogie and his friends Lorna, Bernie and Floaty travel the world, making lots of friends along the way.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - At The North Pole
programme.desc: Bernard gets bored trekking across the frozen Arctic wastes. Some abandoned equipment becomes a source of great entertainment, but not for long.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Package
programme.desc: Zack tries to steal a parcel which Bernard is carrying. At first he succeeds, but Bernard doesn't give up that easily.

programme.title: Bernard - Bernard - The Prisoner
programme.desc: Bernard makes a daring escape from prison, but once he's out, he realises that perhaps life inside wasn't so bad after all.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: VIP Pets

programme.title: Om Nom Stories

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures!

programme.title: Hard Luck
programme.desc: A family comes to the funeral of their beloved grandfather. After the burial it turns out that the numbers grandfather always bet at the lottery just won big, but the winning ticket was buried with him. The race for the buried ticket begins.

programme.title: Room 514
programme.desc: When Anna, a young, idealistic Israeli military investigator, confronts an elite officer with accusations of unnecessary violence against a Palestinian man in the Occupied Territories, her integrity and determination are challenged.

programme.title: Good Luck Sam
programme.desc: Sam and Stéphane, childhood friends and ski equipment designers, embark on a wild quest to save their struggling business. They hatch a plan to enter Sam into the Winter Olympics, and have him compete under his father’s home country of Algeria.

programme.title: Baltic Files I - The Body On The Beach
programme.desc: After being transferred to the German-Danish border, Chief Inspector Svenja is tasked with a case involving a body on a beach. With her new colleague Antione, she investigates a case which involves a liquor dealer and a tragedy that goes back decades.

programme.title: Games People Play
programme.desc: An old group of friends gathers to celebrate Mitzi’s surprise birthday party over a nostalgic weekend at an idyllic seaside villa – just like they used to do as teenagers. Mitzi sets off a game that brings old feelings and power dynamics to the surface.

programme.title: Hunters On A White Field
programme.desc: Deep in the Swedish woods, three friends go on an extended weekend hunting trip. After an initial spell of success, the animals suddenly vanish without a trace. Despite being in a forest without animals, the men decide that the hunt must continue.

programme.title: Hippocrates
programme.desc: Benjamin dreams of being a great doctor, but his internship at his father’s ward doesn’t turn out the way he hoped. His experience as a junior doctor, with its overwhelming responsibility and stiff competition, forces him to confront his limits and fears.

programme.title: All The Songs We Never Sang
programme.desc: Rebellious teen Natsumi ventures from Tokyo to a small island to meet her aunt and learn the art of pearl diving (but secretly to find a treasure she was told about as a child).

programme.title: Stormskerry Maja
programme.desc: At 17, Maja marries humble fisherman Janne and starts a family on the remote island of Stormskerry, where survival is a constant challenge. Amidst the hardships, Maja awakens to her potential, finding resilience and a love that transcends life and death.

programme.title: Cortina Express

programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Comvita Honey
programme.desc: Comvita™ 10+ Manuka Honey is a premium honey from New Zealand that supports immunity and aids digestion. Collagen Peptide Manuka Honey Drink supports skin, joint, and bone health while boosting hydration and elasticity. Night Rejuvenating Manuka Honey is the world’s first honey designed to protect the liver with rejuvenating properties that provides detoxification while you sleep. Comvita™ 10+ 麦卢卡蜂蜜是来自新西兰的优质蜂蜜，因其抗菌特性而闻名。它有助于增强免疫力，缓解喉咙痛，并促进消化。胶原蛋白肽麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品有助于皮肤、关节和骨骼健康，同时改善皮肤水分和弹性。刺梨朝鲜蓟麦芦卡蜂蜜饮品是全球首款设计用于保护肝脏的蜂蜜，结合了麦卢卡蜂蜜的益处和修复特性，支持整体健康和帮助睡眠时排毒。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Krafter Purple Magic Sheet
programme.desc: South Korea’s no. 1 Home Shopping product! A multi-purpose cleaning sheet that works wonders by effectively removing grease, stains, mould and odors on all surfaces! 韩国电视购物频台爆款！这万能布能有效地清理顽固的污渍， 油脂和气味！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OTO Footplus Massager FP-100
programme.desc: OTO Footplus Massager offers a 3D foot massage with a detachable airbag compression system for calves, thighs, arms, and abdomen. Its 3-part sole massage mechanism provides targeted relief, with three intensity levels and five massage modes for a customized experience. It also features a two-level heat function for the soles. OTO Footplus 按摩器提供 3D 足部按摩，并配有可拆卸的气囊压缩系统，适用于小腿、大腿、手臂和腹部，带来全身按摩体验。其三段式足底按摩机制提供针对性缓解，三种按摩强度和五种按摩模式可根据需求定制体验。此外，还配有两档足底加热功能。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Epitex Pillow Bundle
programme.desc: Epitex Brace Contour Pillow is made from dermatological-grade elastomer polymers, molded into a unique grid-like structure that provides unparalleled support while reducing pressure on your head and neck by minimizing surface tension. Epitex Brace Contour Pillow由皮肤科级弹性硅胶制成，提供卓越支撑，有效吸收头颈压力。独特网格设计带来强支撑力和回弹性，同时减少对面部皮肤的挤压。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Wiltshire Pink Board Bundle
programme.desc: All-in-one knife, scissors and board bundle that makes your life easier with an in-built knife sharpener! 全套组合菜刀、剪刀、砧板，让你下厨更轻松！菜刀和剪刀附专业磨刀套！

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Circulon 125
programme.desc: High Strength Activated Ginkgo to Boost Your Mind and Circulation Thomson Circulon 125 – 125mg of Activated Ginkgo Biloba enhanced with cutting-edge Japanese Activated Technology for superior absorption. It helps to boost blood circulation, concentration, and enhance mental clarity, and helps relieve cold and numb hands and feet caused by poor blood circulation. 更高含量活性银杏，有助于提升您的思维和血液循环 Thomson Circulon 125 – 125 毫克高含量活性银杏精华，采用日本尖端活性技术，提升吸收率。它有助于促进血液循环、集中注意力、提升思维清晰度。有助于缓解因血液循环不良而产生的手脚冰冷麻痹等状况。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - SINGCHOICE Bone Health Formula & Eyes Nourisher
programme.desc: A daily wellness duo that strengthens bones, supports joints, and protects eyesight. Bone Health Formula combines Japanese shell-derived calcium, fish collagen, and chondroitin to reinforce bones and joints, while Eyes Nourisher adds Japanese blueberries, carrots, and lutein to reduce eye fatigue, filter blue light, and maintain clear vision. 日常双效保养组合，同时守护筋骨与视力。筋骨丸采用日本贝类萃取钙、鱼胶原蛋白与软骨素，强化骨骼、维持关节灵活；亮目丸精选日本蓝莓、胡萝卜与叶黄素，帮助过滤蓝光、缓解眼睛疲劳，维持清晰视力。天然配方、每日补充，让骨骼稳、关节顺、双眼更舒适。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - OMRON BP Monitor Atrial Fibrillation HEM-7383T1
programme.desc: Stay ahead of your heart health now with the Omron BP monitor. With a single press of a button, you can now get your blood pressure readings and detect possible atrial fibrillation (AFib), helping you stay ahead of a potential stroke. OMRON 血压测量仪，一次测量即可获得血压和心律分析。通过Omron的智能算法，分析脉搏律动，帮助用户及早发现潜在心房颤动风险。心房颤动风险是脉搏间隔不规律的现象，提早发现有助于降低中风的风险。居家也能轻松监测心脏健康。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - PHS HAIRSCIENCE HOM/FEM Anti-Hair Loss Bundle
programme.desc: FEM & HOM Fortify Hair Loss Bundle restore scalp health and reduce hair fall for both men and women with thinning hair concerns. FEM & HOM 防脱发套组，恢复头皮健康，减少男女头发稀疏问题。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - TIGER EDGE SLB-A10U Food Blender
programme.desc: A premium innovation—patented 45° angled blades crush fruits, frozen foods, and ice while keeping flavor. The angled vortex ensures smooth blends, with 10 speeds for any texture. Lightweight Tritan cup and removable blades make cleaning easy, while the compact, stylish design delivers full functionality for daily use. 全新上市，专利 45° 斜角刀片，轻松粉碎水果、冷冻食材与冰块，完美保留食材原味。倾斜漩涡设计，让食材混合顺滑，10 段速度随心调节。轻调理杯、可拆刀座，清洗方便，操作简单，功能全面又时尚。

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Naturalle Sugar Care Tea
programme.desc: Crafted from 100% natural leaves including gymnema, mulberry and green tea, the Naturalle Sugar Care tea is mild-flavoured and low in calories. A perfect post-meal beverage, this tea may help curb sugar cravings and support healthy post-meal blood sugar levels, making it great for individuals who frequently consume carbohydrate-rich or sugary foods. Naturalle 糖适宁茶采用 100% 天然叶材精制而成，包括匙羹藤、桑叶与绿茶，口感清淡、低热量。糖适宁茶是适合餐后饮用，有助于抑制对甜食的渴望和维持血糖健康水平，非常适合经常摄取高碳水或含糖食物的人士饮用

programme.title: The Wonder Shop (Home Shopping) - Thomson Livrin
programme.desc: Promotes and Enhances Liver Health with Thomson Livrin! 奶蓟精华有助维护肝脏健康、精神更佳、皮肤更美哦！

On the Go Riding Sailing and Soaring exposes babies to the different ways people travel -- on land, by sea, and in the air -- while it presents them with captivating real-world images, funny puppet shows, and beautiful classical music by Beethoven, Haydn, Mozart and Rossini.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Forgiveness - EP110
programme.desc: In this episode, we will go on an expedition to the Planet of Forgiveness and learn that forgiveness is an act of love that helps us overcome anger and misunderstandings and that when we forgive we see things with more clarity. And most importantly, when we recognize our mistakes we realize the importance of asking for forgiveness through our hearts.

programme.title: Mellodees - London Bridge Is Falling Down - EP6
programme.desc: Playtime gets interrupted when Dee's four-legged friend, Treble knocks down his creation. No need to get upset though, Dee and Treble rebuild the bridge while smiling and laughing together. A great display of teamwork.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep16 - EP116
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Factory Fishing Fiasco - EP109
programme.desc: Nick Slick has launched a new fishing ship looking to destroy all the fish.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers S2 - The Earth Needs Their Kelp / Iceberg Ahead - EP201
programme.desc: The Rangers must return balance to an ocean environment; a large iceberg calves, leaving a floe on a collision course for a clan of polar bears.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Static Monstro-City / I-Yi-Yi Robot - EP117
programme.desc: When JD and Kent accidentally create a static electricity charged laundry monster, it rampages through town. With the help of Robert Van de Graaff they find a way to defeat the monster’s static cling. / When the Antimatters create a rogue robot, it’s up to the Secret Lab Kids to save the day.

programme.title: Secret Millionaires Club - Neither Borrower Nor Lender Be, Dude - EP102
programme.desc: While the SMC sets out to save their local newspaper by bringing it to the internet, Jones borrows Lisa’s carefully saved money then can’t pay it back. Tensions escalate as both learn a high priced lesson.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - The Magic Ring - EP115
programme.desc: A trip to meet Mr. Arnold's friends Penn and Teller leads to a magical mystery that only the Super K's can solve: what happened to Houdini's Ring?

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Contest - EP102
programme.desc: Biggie D enters a truck pull contest but soon realizes he'll need more training to win the gold.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal - Reginald's Counterattack - EP22
programme.desc: The story takes place in the distant future and focuses on a boy named Yuma Tsukumo, the number one bad boy at his school. Something unexpected happens when Ryoga challenges him to a Duel as the mysterious ghost of Astral appears before them, a new legend begins.

programme.title: Kidaverse Roblox Rumble - Kidaverse Roblox Rumble Ep3 - EP3
programme.desc: Eight kid gamers, ages eight to twelve, battle it out in ten different Roblox games to win prizes and find out who is the ultimate gamer! Video gamer, football star, and children’s book author Rashad Jennings hosts!

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - Sleeping-Duty - EP116
programme.desc: When Mr. Arnold falls asleep in class, the kids take on an important mission without him that they're not quite ready for.

programme.title: Shaq's Garage - The Big Trail - EP103
programme.desc: Queenie is too big to go through the fancy carwash she saw on TV, the Shaq Paq has to find a way to cheer her up.

programme.title: Yu-Gi-Oh! Zexal - Hunting Down The Hunter, Part 1 - EP23
programme.desc: The story takes place in the distant future and focuses on a boy named Yuma Tsukumo, the number one bad boy at his school. Something unexpected happens when Ryoga challenges him to a Duel as the mysterious ghost of Astral appears before them, a new legend begins.

programme.title: The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat - The Twisted Tales of Felix the Cat Ep2 - EP102
programme.desc: The beyond surreal adventures of Felix The Cat and his friends set in an incredibly weird and fantastical toon world where everything is alive and only dream logic rules. Each episode has three segments.

programme.title: Baby Einstein - World Music
programme.desc: World Music introduces you and your little one to beautiful sounds from every continent, bringing a fresh, new experience of music and culture. Sing, dance and play to exotic rhythms that open the door to an appreciation of different cultures from around the world.

programme.title: Kids' Planet - Courage - EP111
programme.desc: In this episode, we will explore the corners of outer space where only the brave ones can reach. Curious will teach us that being brave doesn't mean being afraid, but acting in spite of fear. We will discover that courage is inside each one of us and that "determination" allows us to face our fears, while "will" pushes us to do things with passion.

programme.title: Mellodees - Baa Baa Black Sheep - EP9
programme.desc: Join our dance party at The Farm. Dee shows the sheep how to get down.

programme.title: Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy - Sunny Bunnies: Get Busy Ep19 - EP119
programme.desc: In a new spin-off series of mini-episodes - ‘Sunny Bunnies Get Busy’ - the characters are on hand to entertain and engage viewers in various colourful and creative activities and inspire children to 'Get Busy'.

programme.title: Giselle and the Green Team - The Case of the Nuclear Waste Conundrum - EP110
programme.desc: Gisele and her Green Team try to stop raidoactivity in the ground water.

programme.title: Rainbow Rangers S2 - Backyard Bird Feeder / If You Can't Stand the Heat - EP202
programme.desc: A backyard feeder is too close to a glass window, and the Rangers need to find another way to safely feed the birds; when the Rangers act to save animals from a forest fire, they jump the gun and accidentally put out a controlled burn.

programme.title: Thomas Edison's Secret Lab - Burpin’ Babies / Backpack Payback - EP118
programme.desc: Kent’s youth serum works a little too well and turns the gang into screaming babies. The serum soon wears off – sort of – now they’re adults trapped in baby bodies and Von Bolt doesn’t know whether to obey or burp them. / When the Anti-Matters steal JD's backpack and discover the portable ALVA, they unwittingly cause Edison's hologram to disappear. The Secret Lab Kids must concoct a plan to retrieve the backpack before Edison's lost forever.

programme.title: Secret Millionaires Club - When Pigs Fly - EP103
programme.desc: When Elena has to raise a potbellied pig for school, she can't do anything right and considers herself to be a failure.

programme.title: Superhero Kindergarten - Sleeping-Duty - EP116
programme.desc: When Mr. Arnold falls asleep in class, the kids take on an important mission without him that they're not quite ready for.

programme.title: Monster Town
programme.desc: Meet the Monster Trucks, a gang of colossal, hard-working cars who team up to help their friends and community in Monster City.

programme.title: Argo's World
programme.desc: Join Marie and Argo in this exciting STEM edutainment mixed-media series as they venture through Cyberspace and make discoveries about the world through historical figures and notable real-world personalities! Special guests include a founding father of the Internet, a NASA astronaut, a top robotics expert, and clever folks from M.I.T!

programme.title: Ollie! The Boy Who Became What He Ate
programme.desc: Ollie is a 6-year-old with a massive imagination, often lost in his own world - flipping, sliding, climbing and rocket-blasting through the house, practicing at being the master of all things. But even masters need to stop and refuel. When meals or snack time interrupt Ollie’s play, he finds himself confronted with the real challenge of childhood; trying new food. To escape his predicament, Ollie uses his magic spoon to transport himself, along with his sister Poppy, and her stuffy Nummy, to a food planet filled with adventure and the very food Ollie stuck his spoon into.

programme.title: The Fixies
programme.desc: The Fixies follows the comical misadventures of Tom Thomas and his secret friendship with Simka and Nolik, the children of the Fixie family that lives in his apartment. There’s just no end to the troubles Tom Thomas and his Fixie friends get themselves into with all the gadgets and appliances around them!

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - God's Gang | Alien Mayhem! | Episode 1, 2, 3
programme.desc: God’s Gang faces insane challenges - from stopping a mad scientist to battling aliens and saving blue whales.

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | The Cotton Candy Conspiracy | Episode 1
programme.desc: Gods Gang

programme.title: Gods Gang - Gods Gang - Gods Gang | Blue Whales and Reptilian Ruses | Episode 2
programme.desc: God's Gang embarks on an underwater mission to rescue blue whales, only to encounter an alien ambush. The team faces unexpected challenges while trying to infiltrate a clandestine blue whale party. Suspense builds as they attempt a daring rescue operation.

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Chuck the Cherry Picker helps Harvey
programme.desc: Harvey needs a helping hand harvesting fruits from the tall trees! Troy selects the best truck to help: Chuck the Cherry Picker!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Frank the Fire Trucks saves Gary
programme.desc: Uh-oh, Gary the Garbage truck is on fire! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Frank the Firetruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Amber the Ambulance helps Ethan
programme.desc: Ethan the Dumptruck feels sick; he ate too much candy! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Amber the Ambulance!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Ethan The Dumptruck collects the bouncy balls
programme.desc: Pickle dumped a tonne of bouncy balls on the motorway! Troy selects the best truck to help her: Ethan the Dumptruck!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Dane's Wrecking Ball causes mayhem
programme.desc: Dane's wrecking ball accidentally fell off and knocked Frank! Troy selects the best truck to help him: Hector the Helicopter!

programme.title: Troy the Train - Troy the Train - Christopher getsstuck in cement
programme.desc: Christopher fell asleep and woke up covered in concrete! Troy selects the best truck to help release him: Dane the Crane!

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - BUILDING BLOCKS, FALLING TOWERS – ROOKIE AND THE MOLE
programme.desc: Rookie finds a large box full of building blocks. He starts building towers, but they keep collapsing whenever he looks away. He discovers a hole in the ground with nothing inside, but curious as ever, he presses a button to inflate himself and blows into one of the holes, causing the troublemaker, a friendly mole, to pop out. Rookie catches his new friend , and together they set up an amazing building.

programme.title: Rookie Robot - Rookie Robot - HAPPY BIRTHDAY TOOO YOUUUUU! ROOKIE AND THE BIRTHDAY BASH
programme.desc: In the final episode of the second season, Rookie hears suspicious noises and begins to investigate. But he can‘t find the source! When he finally opens a door, he is greeted by a confetti cannon - a surprise birthday party! All his friends are gathered around a cake with two candles, and at the little turtle’s count, they all join in singing ‘Happy Birthday’ together!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Show do Jacarelvis
programme.desc: O Jacarelvis tenta fazer um show quando uma abelhinha aparece em seu caminho, esse imprevisto pode se tornar uma grande parceria!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Papa Tudo
programme.desc: Ao som de um gostoso rock vamos todos comer direitinho, o Jacarelvis e amigos mostram como é bom e gostoso comer de tudo um pouco e como e importante os legumes e frutas nas refeições.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Escovo os dentes
programme.desc: Um divertido reggae feito para ajudar as crianças durante a escovação dos dentes, tornando esse momento divertido e prazeroso.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Minha Escola
programme.desc: Uma homenagem bem didática ao segundo lar de muitas crianças!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Da Aqui
programme.desc: Aprenda sobre as frutas e alguns de seus benefícios ao ritmo de um Rock'n Roll!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Castigo
programme.desc: Vamos tentar entender esse tal de castigo ao som de um divertido blues !

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Mico Tuco
programme.desc: O Mico Tuco te cutuca nesse rockabilly que não vai deixar ninguém parado!

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Tem que limpar
programme.desc: Tudo que suja, molha ou quebra precisa de alguém pra ajeitar, não é mesmo? O Jacarelvis e seus amigos mostram como ajudar a mamãe e o papai de uma forma divertida e segura.

programme.title: Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacarevis e Amigos - Jacare Careca
programme.desc: Uma divertida cantiga que brinca com a sonoridade do nome dos animais.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - Underwater
programme.desc: Accidentally, Chip and his friends fall into a lake where they are collected by the spacecraft of a sodium atom that carries them to Sodia, an underwater city. There, the atoms of sodium and chlorine live a long conflict. The chlorine wants to join to sodium to form molecules of sodium chloride while sodium atoms prefer to remain. The patrol antimatter comes into contact with chlorine and propose them to provide rifles to dominate the sodium and so force them to molecularized, but Chip makes a fool of the antimatter and makes the chlorine and sodium are no longer enemies and prevails the peace in the underwater world.

programme.title: LMN's - LMN's - The storm
programme.desc: Inside an old wind mill in the midst of a severe storm, Chip and his friends expect it to pass and continue their way. Outside, under the stormy air, the patrol antimatter communicate to Dr. No that they have already found the boy. The evil scientist is confident that this time they will not fail. But when the wind stops, Chip devises a strategy and let the antimatter locked in the mill, as he and the atoms move on.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Beach Rescue
programme.desc: Zitron deploys his shark minions to scare the crowd at the beach! Rodeo and Booster must save summer!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Sign
programme.desc: The ice cream sign's disappeared! This can only be Zitron's handy work. Rodeo, Booster and Dane merge to stop the thief.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Super Fire Truck
programme.desc: Frank is teaching Robo and Booster the basics of a firetruck when Zitron starts a fire using fireworks. Time to merge!

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - The Pumpkin Pie Stand
programme.desc: It's Halloween! Zitron spooks Carrie and throws pies at everyone at the farm. It's time to stop the mischief.

programme.title: RoboFuse - RoboFuse - Halloween Tricks
programme.desc: Rodeo and Booster’s friends dress up for Halloween, but Zitron gets in the way of the fun. Robo to the rescue.

programme.title: Chefclub Kids
programme.desc: With Chefclub Kids, the little ones get their hands dirty all while having fun in the kitchen. Whether they're learning to prepare dinner, bake goodies, or explore new flavors, Chefclub Kids is a way for children to gain confidence through cooking!

programme.title: VIP Pets
programme.desc: We are the VIP Pets! The coolest pets with a passion for hair! We are best friends and together we will discover lots of beautiful hairstyles and go on exciting adventures!

programme.title: Om Nom Stories
programme.desc: Sweet tooth Om Nom is wandering Around the world, eats a lot of candies and tries to find his Dream job. Watch his adventures and solve different puzzles on the way!

programme.title: Ryan Defrates
programme.desc: Ryan Defrates

programme.title: Grojband
programme.desc: The story about 12 year old Corey that emotionally torments his sister so that she will write the ultimate lyrics for his garage band.

programme.title: Everybody Loves a Moose
programme.desc: An oddball buddy series between an over ambitious boy, Jack and his pal Moose, a melodramatic self-confessed expert in everything. Except he isn't! Despite his best intentions, he always messes up and although Jack may not get what he want, you can't help being sucked in by Moose's relentless optimism and zest for life!

programme.title: Tom's Car Wash
programme.desc: Tom loves caring for his friends; they can always count on Tom to tow them back to his car wash, where they're guaranteed to leave sparking!

programme.title: Eliot Kid
programme.desc: When a tooth falling out turns into a hunt for the “giant mouse”, when the city’s sewers transform into Indiana Jones’ white rapids or when a trip to the toilets becomes an expedition to a haunted house, well then you’ve entered the wonderful world of Eliot Kid!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Cyboars
programme.desc: Part Machine, Part Boar, All Hero!

programme.title: Princess Play Time
programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Talking Tom and Friends
programme.desc: Things get even more epic in Season 3 as Talking Tom and Friends try new ways to make their dreams come true, making more friends (and enemies) along the way!

programme.desc: The proud Princess likes to do things her own way, but her antics are always joined by her restless brother, Prince, who tends to turn everything topsy-turvy. Any playtime in their room transforms into a fantastic journey through unusual worlds: the children arrange a picnic on the Moon, conduct a detective investigation in a toy city, or search for pirate treasures on islands! Although initially, the Princess and Prince seem to clash and compete, by the end, they always find joy in each other's company and that of their cherished dog, Bona.

programme.title: Box Yourself
programme.desc: Great Projects From Ordinary Cardboard!

programme.title: Angry Birds Toons
programme.desc: Check out Angry Birds Toons compilations! Each compilation has several episodes from your favorite shows including Angry Birds, Piggy Tales, and Stella!

programme.title: Pumpkin Reports
programme.desc: Max Green’s new brother and sister are aliens sent to Earth as the advance party for an invasion - and he’s the only one who can stop them turning humans into unwilling slave-gardeners.

programme.title: Ebb and Flo
programme.desc: The world of Ebb and Flo is seen through Ebb’s eyes and Ebb reveals all the emotions grown-ups try to hide. Flo doesn’t think of Ebb as a dog, and Ebb doesn’t think of Flo as a small human, they just are the best of friends. Until Bird arrives to lovingly disrupt Ebb’s world. Ebb and Flo’s home is an old boat moored by the beach. Things Couldn’t Be Better!

programme.title: Gummy Bear and Friends
programme.desc: Gummy lives in an apartment with his friend Harry the Chameleon, while his other friend Kala the Cat hangs out in a ninja dojo on the roof. Together they go on wild and wacky adventures in their building and hometown. Enjoy the fun and crazy adventures...

programme.title: Five Corners
programme.desc: A psychotic young man returns to his old neighborhood after release from prison. He seeks out the woman he previously tried to rape and the man who protected her, with twisted ideas of love for her and hate for him

programme.title: Tuareg: The Desert Warrior
programme.desc: Castellari. Tuareg and his nomadic tribe extend their hospitality to two desperate strangers who arrive at their peaceful desert oasis. Government soldiers attack the oasis and attempt to slaughter every man, woman and child. The tribe flees, beginning a suspenseful and lethal game of hide-and-seek across breathtaking desert vistas as Tuareg attempts to escort the strangers to safety while avenging the massacre.

programme.title: Karaoke Crushers!
programme.desc: Grab your mic and get ready to belt out your best vocals! You better warn the neighbours!

programme.title: Games People Play
programme.desc: An old group of friends gathers to celebrate Mitzi’s surprise birthday party over a nostalgic weekend at an idyllic seaside villa – just like they used to do as teenagers. Mitzi sets off a game that brings old feelings and power dynamics to the surface.

programme.title: Hippocrates
programme.desc: Benjamin dreams of being a great doctor, but his internship at his father’s ward doesn’t turn out the way he hoped. His experience as a junior doctor, with its overwhelming responsibility and stiff competition, forces him to confront his limits and fears.

programme.title: Like Crazy
programme.desc: Two mental patients, a motor-mouthed fantasist and a tattooed introvert, who met at a community hospital, fled the hospital to embark on a road trip from Tuscany to Rome, in search of love and happiness in the open-air nuthouse - the world of sane people.

programme.title: Our Children
programme.desc: A doctor brings a boy to Belgium and raises him as his own. When the boy reaches manhood, he gets married and starts his own family, but he still relies on the doctor, his adoptive father. When trouble strikes his family, dependence turns into domination.

programme.title: Stormskerry Maja
programme.desc: At 17, Maja marries humble fisherman Janne and starts a family on the remote island of Stormskerry, where survival is a constant challenge. Amidst the hardships, Maja awakens to her potential, finding resilience and a love that transcends life and death.

programme.title: Oddball
programme.desc: An eccentric chicken farmer, with the help of his granddaughter, trains his mischievous dog Oddball to protect a penguin sanctuary from fox attacks in an attempt to reunite his family and save their seaside town.

programme.title: The Traveller: The Temptation of Evil
programme.desc: Captain Kandinsky is called upon to investigate the death of a dentist whose body was found charred. Kandinsky doubts the official verdict of suicide when he discovers two other victims whose bodies were also found charred in the same region.

programme.title: Top Dogs
programme.desc: A dramedy about two estranged brothers from Normandy. Antoine is happily married with two kids and a successful boat driver, whereas Christian is a globe-trotting hustler. When Antoine becomes involved in sleazy activities, Christian comes to his rescue.

programme.title: El Alamein – The Line of Fire
programme.desc: Against a backdrop of searing daytime heat and chilling nighttime cold, three-time Italian Academy Awards winner Enzo Monteleone paints a gritty, powerful WW II epic of the Italian army’s battle with the Germans to drive Allied Forces from North Africa.

programme.title: Heavenly Nomadic
programme.desc: A family of nomads dwelling high in the mountains of Kyrgyzstan doesn't need any of the conveniences of modern civilization in order to be happy. But progress is creeping into their lives regardless, destroying legends and traditions as it comes.

programme.title: Sima's Song
programme.desc: In 1970s Afghanistan, best friends Suraya and Sima are torn apart by political upheaval. Suraya is a wealthy communist and Sima is a traditional singer, and though their paths diverge, their enduring bond proves stronger than ideology.

programme.title: Empty Nets
programme.desc: Amir loves Narges and Narges loves Amir. But their hopes and dreams for a life together collide head on with the web of tradition, corruption, and social hierarchy that continues to rule over the lives of a new generation in Iran.
